scripts.smoke-docker: docker build -t framepiler-test-env ../docker && docker run --rm -v ../../frame_transpiler:/frame_transpiler -v ..:/framepiler_test_env framepiler-test-env bash -c 'cd /framepiler_test_env/adapter_protocol && npm install && FRAMEC_BIN=/frame_transpiler/target/release/framec ./scripts/run_adapter_smoke.sh'
